heading: Customer journey
subtitle: Six phases from first contact to advocacy.

phases.title: Awareness
phases.description: The moment someone first hears about us — from a friend, an ad, or a search.

phases.title: Consideration
phases.description: They compare options and weigh up whether this is right for them.

phases.title: Sign-up
phases.description: The account is created and the first action is taken.

phases.title: Onboarding
phases.description: They find their footing and complete the first valuable task.

phases.title: Habit
phases.description: Regular use becomes part of their routine.

phases.title: Advocacy
phases.description: They recommend us to others and help the community grow.
